# TVRemote.AllowedTVsItem

**Device Management Profile**

The array of valid Apple TV identifiers that the remote can connect to.

## Declaration

```swift
object TVRemote.AllowedTVsItem
```

## Objects

- **TVRemote.AllowedRemotesItem**: The array of valid devices that Apple TV can connect to.

items.description: The array of valid devices that Apple TV can connect to.
